rulings.Case Title: JAMES BARAGAR et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BP) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION To Require Pltfs To Respond To Special Interrogatories, Set Two, And Request For Production Of Documents, Set Two, Prior To The Discovery Cut-Off Date Or, Alternatively, For An Order Extending The Discovery Cut-Off Date For Cummins To Await The Responses
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Wednesday, August 18, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Defendant Cummins Engine Company¿s motion to require plaintiffs to respond to second set of special interrogatories and request for production of documents prior to the discovery cut-off date is denied based on plaintiffs¿ representation that they do not know of any witness who has not already been identified. Defendant¿s alternative motion to extend the discovery cut-off date is denied for the same reason. = (220/HEK)
